reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.14: lighter drawing and complete fills on the main canvas. Stroke masks are now built only over the stroke's bounding box instead of the full canvas, cutting stroke compositing from 28 ms to under 7 ms, verified pixel-identical. Bucket fill no longer leaves an unfilled ring along anti-aliased stroke edges: the fill mask is dilated and the colour is placed underneath the strokes, so soft edges blend over the fill with no gaps and no leaking.
